summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AI Traveller Planner i18n implementation. Tested language switching, page navigation, homepage sections, footer links, and user interface components across 5 languages (English, Turkish, German, Spanish, French).

design_issues.issue: Some page navigation experienced timeout delays but pages loaded successfully

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all 6 required sections (Hero, Popular Destinations, Hidden Gems, Benefits, Incentives, AI Emotion)
Language selector in Navbar works perfectly with all 5 languages (en, tr, de, es, fr)
Language switching applies translations correctly (tested Turkish: 'AI Seyahat Planlayıcı', German: 'AI Reiseplaner', Spanish: 'AI Planificador de Viajes')
Language persists after page reload via localStorage
Footer displays all required links: About, Destinations, Contact, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service
Social media links (Instagram, Facebook) present in footer
Privacy Policy page loads with correct content and data-testid
Terms of Service page loads with correct content and data-testid
Login page loads with proper form elements and data-testids
Destinations page loads with beautiful destination cards (Paris, Tokyo, Barcelona, Istanbul, New York, Dubai)
Brand color rgb(0,191,165) used consistently throughout the application
Navigation links functional and properly routed
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
